personas: Persona 1: Tech-Savvy Professional - Aged 25-40, comfortable with digital tools, seeks efficiency and quick access to features.
Persona 2: Casual User - Aged 35-60, minimal technical knowledge, prefers simple, clear navigation and guidance.
Persona 3: Accessibility-Focused User - Any age, relies on assistive technologies, requires compliant and accessible interfaces.
key_flows: User onboarding and account setup flow including guided steps and progress indicators.
Primary task completion flow with clear, minimal steps to accomplish main user goals.
Error recovery flow providing clear feedback and options to resolve issues.
friction_points: Complex navigation that confuses casual users.
Lack of clear feedback during loading or error states.
Insufficient accessibility support for keyboard and screen reader users.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Content organized from general to specific with a clear primary focus on core features followed by secondary information, ensuring easy discoverability.
navigation: Top-level global navigation with 4-5 primary sections.
Secondary navigation within each section for detailed options.
Breadcrumbs to support user orientation and backtracking.
categorization: Features grouped by user tasks and goals.
Settings and preferences categorized by functionality (e.g., account, notifications).

components: Primary content area on the right
Header with branding and user profile access
Footer with support links and legal information

responsive.mobile: Single-column vertical stack with collapsible hamburger menu for navigation, main content prioritized.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with collapsible sidebar and visible header, adjusting spacing for medium screens.
responsive.desktop: Full two-column layout with visible sidebar and header, content fully expanded.

design_system.typography: Use a sans-serif font family with clear hierarchy: H1 (32px, 700), H2 (24px, 600), Body (16px, 400), Captions (12px, 400). Line height 1.5 for readability.
design_system.colors: Primary brand color for CTAs and highlights, secondary neutral palette for backgrounds and text, error color in red (#D32F2F), success in green (#388E3C).
design_system.spacing: 8pt baseline grid with increments at 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48px for margins and paddings.
components: Buttons with primary, secondary, disabled states.
Form inputs with clear labels and inline validation.

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements must be reachable via keyboard tab order, with visible focus indicators and logical navigation sequence.
accessibility.screen_reader: Use appropriate ARIA roles and labels, semantic HTML5 elements, and ensure dynamic content updates are announced.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for text and interactive elements against background.

interactions.animations: Subtle transitions on hover and focus states with 150ms ease-in-out to improve responsiveness without distraction.
interactions.loading_state: Use skeleton loaders or spinners centered in the content area with descriptive text for screen readers.
interactions.empty_state: Display informative messages with icons and call-to-action buttons guiding users to add or find content.
